since_last: 34% of 100 AI names green; Powering AI leads +0.14%; AI bubble risk 50 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 34% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -1.04% · BTC +0.43% · Gold +0.60% · Nasdaq100 -1.38%. 34% of 100 AI names are green — broad selling. Powering AI is doing the heavy lifting at +0.14%.

cards.headline: Powering AI leads, Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Powering AI at +0.14%; weakest is Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical at -2.67%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: ISRG is the standout at -13.34%
cards.body: Leaders: LEU +6.22%, CSCO +2.63%, DELL +2.03%, ARM +2.01%, HPE +1.97%. Laggards: ISRG -13.34%, PUBM -7.12%, SPCX -5.51%, AMAT -5.38%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -5.51% at $123.89
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -5.51% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 50 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 50/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
